name: C-7 aibom refuses to overwrite an existing emit path without --force per the safety contract
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/aibom.sh" --tag v1.0.0 --emit a.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/aibom.sh" --tag v1.1.0 --emit a.json 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'exists' err.txt && grep -q 'force' err.txt && echo refused 1>&2
